title: Xylem Inc. Declares Third Quarter Dividend of 30 Cents per Share
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--The Board of Directors of Xylem Inc. (NYSE: XYL), has declared a third quarter dividend of $0.30 per share payable on September 29, 2022 to shareholders of record as of September 1, 2022. About Xylem Xylem (XYL) is a leading global water technology company committed to solving critical water and infrastructure challenges with innovation. title: Xylem (XYL) Up 13% in 6 Months: Will the Momentum Continue?
text: Strong demand across end markets, solid backlogs and orders are aiding Xylem's (XYL) performance. The company's consistent measures to reward its shareholders are encouraging.

title: Xylem (XYL) Beats on Q2 Earnings, Improves 2022 Guidance
text: Xylem's (XYL) Q2 results benefit from strong demand across its end markets and record backlog and order levels. The company raises its 2022 view owing to strong demand and better price realization.

title: Xylem (XYL) Q2 Earnings and Revenues Top Estimates
text: Xylem (XYL) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 20% and 4.58%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?

title: Xylem Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results
text: WASHINGTON--(BUSINESS WIRE)-- #LetsSolveWater--Xylem Reports Second Quarter 2022 Results

title: 4 Industrial Stocks Poised to Trump Q2 Earnings Estimates
text: End-market strength is likely to have aided the second-quarter 2022 performances of MRC Global (MRC), Xylem (XYL), Zebra Technologies (ZBRA) and Eaton (ETN), partly offset by supply chain woes.
